steps.title: Identify the stated purpose
steps.content: The student wants to indicate the willow oak's native ecoregion—the sole criterion for evaluating these choices.

steps.title: Apply the purpose to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D directly fulfills the goal by stating the willow oak is native to the Southeastern ecoregion.
The other three don't specify an ecoregion—they reference the scientific name, tree type, or general facts about deciduous trees.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
